title: MetaMask core headless Perps read
description: Proves the headless `core` adapter instantiates @metamask/perps-controller against a resolved MetaMask/core checkout and reads live HyperLiquid testnet Perps state (positions, open orders, account state) over HTTP — no CDP, bridge, or UI.

status.intent: Resolve the core checkout and report headless compatibility mode

read_positions.intent: Read live Perps positions from the headless controller

read_orders.intent: Read live Perps open orders from the headless controller

read_account.intent: Read live Perps account state from the headless controller
